{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/211-table-of-contents.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. Table of Contents


{quote}1. _The Five-Type Typology of Principal-Side Agents_{quote}

----





h2. Table of Contents

1. _The Five-Type Typology of Principal-Side Agents_
2. _What Makes a Professional Colleague Agent_
3. _Empirical Case Study: «Обучай»_
4. _Architecture of Professional Colleague Agents_
5. _The Economics of Profession-Wide Replication_
6. _Risks Specific to this Category_
7. _Application Domains_
8. _Pilot Proposal: SGB Advocate Colleague_
9. _Relationship to Other Agent Types_
10. _Open Questions_
11. _Call for Collaboration_

----



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [253-table-of-contents|253-table-of-contents.md] (сходство 0.26)
* [169-table-of-contents|169-table-of-contents.md] (сходство 0.23)
* [209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-|209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-.md] (сходство 0.18)




----

_Смотрите также:_
* [253-table-of-contents|253-table-of-contents.md]
* [169-table-of-contents|169-table-of-contents.md]

* [308-table-of-contents|308-table-of-contents.md]


h2. Упоминается в

* [1. The Five-Type Typology of Principal-Side Agents|212-1-the-five-type-typology-of-principal-side-agents.md]
* [10. Open Questions|221-10-open-questions.md]
* [2. What Makes a Professional Colleague Agent|213-2-what-makes-a-professional-colleague-agent.md]
* [3. Empirical Case Study: «Обучай»|214-3-empirical-case-study-обучай.md]
* [3. What Makes a Composite Skills Agent|256-3-what-makes-a-composite-skills-agent.md]
* [3. What Makes a Representative Agent|172-3-what-makes-a-representative-agent.md]
* [6. Coordination and Disagreement Resolution|259-6-coordination-and-disagreement-resolution.md]
* [9. Relationship to Other Agent Types|220-9-relationship-to-other-agent-types.md]
* [Abstract|210-abstract.md]
* [Acknowledgments|182-acknowledgments.md]
* [Acknowledgments|224-acknowledgments.md]
* [Appendix A: Comparative Table — Five Agent Types|226-appendix-a-comparative-table-five-agent-types.md]
* [Appendix A: The Six-Type Taxonomy (Updated)|269-appendix-a-the-six-type-taxonomy-updated.md]
* [Appendix B: Decision Framework — When to Build Type 1 First|227-appendix-b-decision-framework-when-to-build-type-1.md]
* [Appendix B: Summary of Contributions|149-appendix-b-summary-of-contributions.md]
* [Appendix C: Configuration Template Example|271-appendix-c-configuration-template-example.md]
* [References|183-references.md]
* [Table of Contents|169-table-of-contents.md]
* [Table of Contents|253-table-of-contents.md]
* [Table of Contents|308-table-of-contents.md]
* [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам|README.md]
* [Кластеры тематически близких файлов|../CLUSTERS.md]
* [Кто ты|345-кто-ты.md]
* [Твоя relationship с другими AI|358-твоя-relationship-с-другими-ai.md]
* [Что ты НЕ МОЖЕШЬ делать без Max approval|352-что-ты-не-можешь-делать-без-max-approval.md]
h2. Упоминается в

* [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам|../README.md]


h2. Связанные документы

* [2. What Makes a Professional Colleague Agent|213-2-what-makes-a-professional-colleague-agent.md] _60%_
* [Appendix B: Decision Framework — When to Build Type 1 First|227-appendix-b-decision-framework-when-to-build-type-1.md] _48%_
* [1. The Five-Type Typology of Principal-Side Agents|212-1-the-five-type-typology-of-principal-side-agents.md] _42%_
* [9. Relationship to Other Agent Types|220-9-relationship-to-other-agent-types.md] _42%_
* [Abstract|210-abstract.md] _37%_
* [12. Closing|223-12-closing.md] _33%_
* [3. What Makes a Representative Agent|172-3-what-makes-a-representative-agent.md] _29%_
* [Appendix A: Comparative Table — Five Agent Types|226-appendix-a-comparative-table-five-agent-types.md] _29%_
h2. Связанные документы

* [2. What Makes a Professional Colleague Agent|213-2-what-makes-a-professional-colleague-agent.md] _42%_
* [1. The Five-Type Typology of Principal-Side Agents|212-1-the-five-type-typology-of-principal-side-agents.md] _37%_
* [9. Relationship to Other Agent Types|220-9-relationship-to-other-agent-types.md] _37%_
* [Appendix A: Comparative Table — Five Agent Types|226-appendix-a-comparative-table-five-agent-types.md] _33%_
* [Table of Contents|253-table-of-contents.md] _33%_
* [Table of Contents|169-table-of-contents.md] _29%_
* [3. What Makes a Representative Agent|172-3-what-makes-a-representative-agent.md] _29%_
